title: erigeron rosulatus
intro: Erigeron rosulatus, also known as Rosy Daisy or Mountain Fleabane, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and phenolic compounds. Erigeron rosulatus is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues, and is also used as an antispasmodic and expectorant. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used in folk medicine to make infusions and decoctions for various health conditions.
